summary: Clarified target users and acceptance criteria for passwordless login.

decisions.decision: Use email magic link as the first pass
decisions.reason: Lowest friction for the target users

risks: Email deliverability may affect login success
markdown_body:
# Requirement

Add passwordless login via email magic link.

next_handoff.instructions: Turn the requirement into a technical design covering the auth boundary.
acceptance_criteria: Technical design covers the magic-link auth path
Lists at least one integration risk and a mitigation
States the data model change scope
